ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "turk_code" TEXT /* Unique code assigned to the participant (e.g., for Mechanical Turk) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed by the participant */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date the participant gave consent to participate in the experiment */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the participant */,
  "participation_date" TEXT /* Date the participant first participated in any experiment */,
  "last_participation_date" TEXT /* Date of the participant's last participation */,
  "total_participations" INTEGER /* Total number of experiments the participant has participated in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the participant (e.g., active, inactive, banned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who completed the trial */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the trial belongs to */,
  "bandit_trial" INTEGER /* Trial number in the bandit experiment */,
  "block" INTEGER /* Block number in the experiment */,
  "trial_in_block" INTEGER /* Trial number within the block */,
  "single_option" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if a single option was presented */,
  "left_option" TEXT /* Option presented on the left */,
  "right_option" TEXT /* Option presented on the right */,
  "choice" TEXT /* Choice made by the participant */,
  "feedback" INTEGER /* Feedback received after the choice */,
  "rt" INTEGER /* Response time in milliseconds */,
  "task" TEXT /* Type of task (e.g., bandit) */,
  "choice_type" TEXT /* Type of choice (e.g., high_value, low_value, decision) */,
  "trial_type" TEXT /* Type of trial (e.g., bandit-task) */,
  "trial_index" INTEGER /* Index of the trial in the sequence */,
  "time_elapsed" INTEGER /* Time elapsed since the start of the experiment */,
  "internal_node_id" TEXT /* Internal node ID for the trial */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Experimental condition */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trial */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trial */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used by the participant */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the participant during the trial */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the participant */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the participant's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_choice_type FOREIGN KEY ("choice_type") REFERENCES choice_types ("choice_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_block FOREIGN KEY ("block") REFERENCES blocks ("block_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_trial_type FOREIGN KEY ("trial_type") REFERENCES trial_types ("trial_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_condition FOREIGN KEY ("condition") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_task FOREIGN KEY ("task") REFERENCES tasks ("task_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the condition was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the condition */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the condition */,
  "updater_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conditions_updater_id FOREIGN KEY ("updater_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conditions_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task type */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the task */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the task */,
  "updater_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_updater_id FOREIGN KEY ("updater_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_types" (
  "trial_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial type */,
  "trial_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the trial type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trial type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the trial type */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the trial type */,
  "updater_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the trial type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_types_updater_id FOREIGN KEY ("updater_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_types_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "choice_types" (
  "choice_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each choice type */,
  "choice_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the choice type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the choice type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the choice type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the choice type */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the choice type */,
  "updater_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the choice type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("choice_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_choice_types_updater_id FOREIGN KEY ("updater_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_choice_types_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "block_number" INTEGER /* Number of the block in the sequence */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the block */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the block was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the block */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the block */,
  "updater_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the block */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blocks_updater_id FOREIGN KEY ("updater_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blocks_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
